children.heading: Certain false statements and representations
children.label: 1 Certain false statements and representations
children.text: A person shall not knowingly and willfully make or cause to be made any false statement or representation of a material fact in connection with the furnishing of items or services for which payments may be made by a State from a grant made to the State under section 300x or 300x–21 of this title.

children.heading: Concealing or failing to disclose certain events
children.label: 2 Concealing or failing to disclose certain events
children.text: A person with knowledge of the occurrence of any event affecting the initial or continued right of the person to receive any payments from a grant made to a State under section 300x or 300x–21 of this title shall not conceal or fail to disclose any such event with an intent fraudulently to secure such payment either in a greater amount than is due or when no such amount is due.

children.heading: Criminal penalty for violation of prohibition
children.label: b Criminal penalty for violation of prohibition
children.text: Any person who violates any prohibition established in subsection (a) shall for each violation be fined in accordance with title 18 or imprisoned for not more than 5 years, or both.
